news.summary: Disrupting the Strait of Hormuz turned out to be a powerful weapon. It might be a new way for Iran to keep adversaries at bay, even without a nuclear program.

news.headline: Facing Hard-Liners at Home and Bluster From Trump, Iran Sends Mixed Signals on Peace Talks
